xf:group.title: Title
xf:group.style: width:571px; display:none; position: absolute; z-index: 999999; background: #fff;

w2:calendar.script: var tmpFromValue = {originalFromValue : ibx_FrDate.realValue.replaceAll("-", ""), value : cal_From.getValue()}; udc_obj.trigger("onchangeFromValue", tmpFromValue);
var tmpToValue = {originalToValue : ibx_ToDate.realValue.replaceAll("-", ""), value : cal_To.getValue()}; udc_obj.trigger("onchangToValue", tmpToValue);
